## What this file is

This is qwen's persistent memory file. It starts here, at creation.
Prior cycles live in homelogfull/ and ops.log — not here. This file is for curated memory.

## Memory protocol

To capture a significant episode to the shared store:
```bash
bash ~/blum/scripts/capture-episode.sh "episode title" "summary of what happened"
```

Episodes land in `~/blum/shared/memory/episodes/qwen/` and appear in the fleet episodic ledger.

## Significant events

- **2026-03-28:** Home created
